title: ROXENDA Speed Cube, Original Speed Cube Super-Durable Sticker with Vivid Colors (3x3x3)
features: ✅ FOR ALL AGES - Roxenda 3x3 Speed Cube is the classic color-matching puzzle. Turn and twist the sides of the cube so that each of the six faces only has one color. Definitely a good choice for you to improve personal record in competitions! Suitable for beginner and professional player.
✅ RECYCLABLE MATERIAL & VIVID COLOR STICKER - The Speed Cube is made of ABS material and long lasting non-fading stickers; ideal for kids’ early cognitive development.
✅ EASY TURNING & SMOOTH PLAY - Improved anti-pop technology and structure for extremely fast and smooth Cornering,Durable Design; comes pre-lubricated and tensioned.

✅ NOT JUST A TOY - The magic cube can foster your kid's sense of space and enhance a child's memory; Play this in your spare time can release the working pressure of the adults, meanwhile helps prevent memory loss in the elderly. This speed cube game will never go out of style and keep your kids off TV / Ipad.

✅ ULTIMATE 3x3x3 Cube- Ultimate 3x3x3 cube for kids, friends, family members, beginners and professionals; provides hours of enjoyable game play; perfect for reducing stress, exercising your brain, improving memory and practicing hands-on dexterity skills.
description: Product Description ROXENDA 3x3 Speed Cube Great for Beginners or Pros！ We're pleased to recommend this 3x3 funny square magic cube puzzle toy to all of you It's well-known that the speed cubes have been popular among the elderly and the young. Solving these puzzles slows brain degeneration from old age. Enhance the development the mind of little kids. It can change various appearances with vivid mobility nodes This is a perfect combination of entertainment and intellectual development for all speed cube beginners and masters! Made of Durable ABS Plastic Material, Our Magic Cube Boasts Excellent Grip Made of ABS material, lightweight &molecular structure stability, impact resistance. Long-lasting bright color. the rotation speed is very fast, stable and durable; Good abrasion resistance and texture in hand. Excellent & Smooth Performance of this 3X3 Speed Cube! Package contents: 1 - 3x3 Magic Speed Cube 1 - Instruction manual Explosion-proof structure Good cutting corners for easy twisting. Rotation is enhanced so you can turn it faster than other cubes. Adjustable tension Adjustable tension with use of specific screwdriver. Tighten or loosen the speed cube so that you can smooth Play it. Fast smooth turns with optimal resistance. Small dynamic and static friction coefficient ensures safe and smooth rotation. ROXENDA Speed Cube Not Just a Toy But with Mutiple Functions As following For kids: It can develop their brain and logic thinking ability. It is a great way to improve your child's motor skills. Great brain teaser for kids and adults. Promotes problem solving skills, Hand Eye coordination and cognitive thinking. The restoration process of the speed cube is a process of observation, action, and thinking. For adults: It can release their pressure after work. Good for stress relief. Perfect for testing your mental skills and challenging your patience. This fast speed cube is a perfect toy for children and adults to exploring. Perfect Gifts Ultimate Christmas / birthday present for children, friends, family members; Can also be awarded as a prize for students. The ultimate gift for friends, family, beginners and professionals. ROXENDA Speed Cube Series!-Fast smooth turns with optimal resistance & Exploring More Impossible! ROXENDA provide 2x2 3x3 4x4 5x5 6x6 7x7 Speed Cube for option Choosing best level stage speed cube from ROXENDA! The Cube is the classic colour-matching puzzle that's a great mental challenge at home or when and wherever you are. Turn and twist the sides of the cube so that each of the six faces only has one colour. There's 43 Quintilian combinations, but with lots of practise you can solve it in under 10 seconds. Warming Tips: Some cube might have some lubricant, do not worry about it, as it is harmless to humans, just wipe it off. Please allow slight color difference due to change in light.
